title: Foliage Height Variation
description: Gives grass, ferns, and bushes noticeably shorter variations, similar to how foliage works on Bedrock Edition. Works with any resource pack.
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

**Foliage Height Variation** adds variation to grass, ferns, and bushes by giving them noticably different heights, like it does on [Bedrock Edition](https://minecraft.wiki/w/File:Tall_Grass_Height.jpg), using only models. Works with any resource pack.

![Changes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fa66b49032f32e9bda3abbc30537784ac421bf8_0.webp)

<details>
<summary>View list</summary>
  
- Bush
- Dead Bush
- Dry Grass
- Tall Dry Grass
- Grass
- Fern
- Nether Roots
- Warped Roots



</details>
